children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Subject to subsection (b), there is authorized to be appropriated to the corporation for operation and maintenance expenses $500,000 for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2017.

children.heading: .—Limitation
children.label: b .—Limitation
children.text: Any Federal funds made available under subsection (a) shall be matched on a 1-to-1 basis by non-Federal funds.
